content.text: Initial migration plan: enable auto-migrate for tenants on first login.
Noted initial migration plan.
One-time critical correction: never enable auto-migrate for EU tenants. Legal requires manual opt-in for EU only; US and APAC can still auto-migrate on first login.
Acknowledged correction.
Later implementation plan: migration worker will process tenants by region and login event.
